plugin.name: WeatherFiles
plugin.summary: Browse WeatherFiles models, slice an area, download GRIBs into OpenCPN
plugin.author: Bart Manuel
plugin.description: WeatherFiles plugin for OpenCPN: browse 27+ European weather models, pick an area on the chart, and download sliced GRIB2 files that open directly in the built-in GRIB display. Uses the WeatherFiles public API (api.weatherfiles.com/v1) with a personal access token. See developers.weatherfiles.com.
